name: r-notebook
summary: Open an interactive R notebook on selected files
description: Launches a live JupyterLab server with an R (IRkernel) kernel as a workflow step. Selected files are staged onto EFS (input/) exactly like a normal processor; the user works in the notebook in the browser; the workflow pauses (Step Functions waitForTaskToken) until the session is closed or goes idle, then resumes and tears the task down. Outputs written to output/ persist on EFS. Secure tier; runs on Fargate.
